learning.last_failure_pattern: UP038 unsafe-fix 後に Union import が孤立し F401 → I001 連鎖発生。UP017 連鎖と同じパターン。unsafe-fix 後は必ず F401+I001 追加チェック必要
learning.improvement_notes: 1) vitest coverage include pattern needed to avoid Next.js source map errors. 2) PR branch rebased onto main triggers CI; first PR creation may not trigger if branch is far behind. 3) Use git stash + rebase + force-push to resolve conflicts and trigger CI. 4) Current coverage: Statements 8%, Branches 48.9%, Functions 23.6%. 5) auth-context.tsx tests: need vi.mock('next/navigation'), localStorage mock, global.fetch mock. 6) git add path issue in subdirectory: use git -C /repo/root add instead. 7) UP038 unsafe-fix後はF401+I001を必ず追加チェック (UP017連鎖と同じパターン).
prevented_issues: UP038連鎖: isinstance PEP604修正後のUnion import孤立F401+I001連鎖
